category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a high-quality data compressor; official bzip2 home page describes bzip2/libbzip2 data compression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bzip2; official bzip2 home and manual use bzip2.
docs_sources: Official Sourceware bzip2 documentation page links the manual HTML and other bundled documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Sourceware pages provide downloads and documentation but no official source-control project URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list bzip2/bunzip2/bzcat; official manual describes bzip2 and libbzip2 compression/decompression.
